positive: A stylized, symmetrical illustration of a whimsical nocturnal forest scene, featuring glowing bioluminescent flora, gentle fireflies, and delicate, stylized woodland creatures (e.g., fox, owl, deer) integrated into the foliage. The composition should be highly detailed and centered, utilizing deep indigo and vibrant teal tones contrasted with luminous emerald and gold accents. Emphasize clean silhouette art, strong visual contrast, and an enchanting, storybook aesthetic. Perfect for a single, repeating print on apparel. Vector illustration style, flat graphic design, high resolution, 8k.
